sections.description: AI-powered CSS/JS asset scanner for WordPress.
sections.changelog: Version 1.7.74b (beta): UI fix — the S / A / N results-table header tooltip icon now sits on its own line below the text, matching the ET candidate and Extra Time tooltips (the wider S / A / N column previously kept the icon inline). Carries all of 1.7.73b (converged S:0 A:0 copy fix + S / A / N tooltip) and earlier.
